violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Repair door seal on 2 door cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan in 2 door cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Repaint or replace rusty shelf in 2 door upright fridge. *Note-if condenser leaks again it will need to be serviced.
